TABLE.NAME: local_lernhive_flavour_apps
TABLE.COMMENT: Audit trail of flavour applications. Every time an admin applies a flavour, a row is written here capturing what changed. Used by local_lernhive_configuration in R2 to build a full configuration history.

FIELD.NAME: flavour
FIELD.COMMENT: Flavour key that was applied, e.g. school, lxp, highered, corporate

FIELD.NAME: previous_flavour
FIELD.COMMENT: Flavour key that was active before this apply, NULL on first ever apply

FIELD.NAME: applied_by
FIELD.COMMENT: User ID of the admin who triggered the apply

FIELD.NAME: settings_before
FIELD.COMMENT: JSON: snapshot of the config keys the flavour would touch, as they were before the apply

FIELD.NAME: settings_after
FIELD.COMMENT: JSON: snapshot of the config keys after the apply

FIELD.NAME: overrides_detected
FIELD.COMMENT: 1 if at least one existing non-default value was overwritten, 0 otherwise
